title: Allow batch select in dashboard
excerpt: Please update dashboard widgets to allow batch actions. I use a dashboard to track all of my work and our process involves changing the status of up to 20 items when one portion is completed. Batching this status change …

posts.author: MarkNariy (Mark McNairy)
posts.cookedHtml: Please update dashboard widgets to allow batch actions. I use a dashboard to track all of my work and our process involves changing the status of up to 20 items when one portion is completed. Batching this status change to all 20 items is necessary and currently if accessing the items through a dashboard widget I have to change each status separately. This renders using the dashboard mostly useless as I have to go to the board itself to perform my batch action.

posts.author: JeanRoquain (Roquain)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, that would be very helpful. Has anybody some solutions ?

posts.author: Sheff66 (Chance)
posts.cookedHtml: Batch actions would be very helpful on dashboards. This is 3rd posts in 3 years. maybe if there is a post every year at some point someone got to see it right?

posts.author: natalie.oyen (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: Same for me! Dashboards are useless for certain types of meetings in which updates (example timeline in planning meeting) are required. I need to “re-create” the dashboard on the main bord and applying the same filters as done on the dashboard in order to perform a batch change.

posts.author: sergiogcb (Sergio García-Consuegra [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark!

I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our application, Batch Hero for monday
In particular, to the section of the Operations . These operations can be used to add, copy or delete columns.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Sergio
